creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael from comment #6)
> this shouldn't be closed since the problem persists, the hack is not
> user-friendly at all
One does not have to use the hack, just bring their installed Qt packages in sync.

> it also do not affect only one, it hits every stellarium user
Again, this is Qt's, not Stellarium issue, there's nothing to fix here on our side.
